visual_style.cards: bg-[#050505] border border-white/5 hover:border-orange-500/30 transition-all duration-500
visual_style.buttons_primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-medium tracking-wide transition-all duration-300
visual_style.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-orange-500 text-white transition-all duration-300
visual_style.spacing_philosophy: Generous padding, typically p-8 to p-16 for containers, utilizing negative space to create a luxury feel.
visual_style.border_radius: rounded-none or minimal rounded-sm for a sharp, sophisticated restaurant look.

components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header. Left: Typography Logo, Center: Nav links, Right: Cart icon & Call CTA.
components.hero: 100vh full-screen section. Dark luxury restaurant interior background with Parallax scrolling. Black gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/60 to-black/30). Large elegant typography, floating quick-order WhatsApp button.
components.menu_section: Tabs for categories (e.g., Thalis, Starters, Mains, Breads). Minimalist search bar. Grid layout for items. Each item card has a high-quality image, subtle orange price tag, and 'Add to Cart' button.
components.cart_drawer_and_checkout: Glassmorphism slide-over drawer from the right. Lists cart items with +/- controls. Live total. Minimalist checkout form (Name, Phone, Address, Notes) with border-bottom inputs. 'Place Order' button builds a WhatsApp message and redirects.
components.gallery: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris pattern). Mixed aspect ratios of food and restaurant interior. Images scale slightly on hover.
components.reviews: Smooth auto-scrolling marquee of text reviews. Star ratings in orange.
components.contact: Clean footer-like section with address, WhatsApp number, and subtle map/location details.
components.floating_wa: Fixed bottom-right button, orange circle with WhatsApp icon, continuous subtle pulse animation.

animations.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for smooth section-to-section scroll reveals (opacity 0 to 1, y 20 to 0) with a 0.6s ease-out duration.
animations.scroll_effects: Lenis for ultra-smooth momentum scrolling. Parallax effects on background images.
animations.micro_interactions: Images scale up by 3% on hover. Buttons have a slight background brightness increase. Links feature an underline reveal on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, react-fast-marquee, @studio-freight/react-lenis.
2. Setup Tailwind CSS to include the requested color palette (Deep Black, Premium Orange) and fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit).
3. Implement the Layout with Lenis for smooth scrolling.
4. Build the Hero Section with a parallax image effect using Framer Motion.
5. Create a React Context for the Cart System to manage items, quantities, and totals across the Menu and Drawer.

6. Build the Checkout Form inside the Cart Drawer. On submission, format the order details and user info into a URL-encoded string and trigger window.open(`https://wa.me/9197131389?text=${message}`, '_blank').
7. Ensure all interactive elements include `data-testid` attributes.
8. Use the provided image URLs strictly, avoiding any placeholder image services.
